---
title: "Half-Hours with my Girls, or, ‘Talks about anything\'"
---

## Half-Hours with my Girls, or, ‘Talks about anything\'

**Author:** Amy Susan, Lady Baker
**Date:** 1879
**Imprint:** London: Hatchards

### Notes

<br/>[[footnote:5]]Esmé Stuart [Amélie Leroy], <i>For Half a Crown</i>. National Society, 1887.
<br/>[[footnote:6]]Mary E. Palgrave <i>A Promise Kept</i>. National Society, 1887.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
